mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO reservation( reservation_code, reserved_for_at, time_zone, reservation_status, total_price, adult_qty, child_qty, teen_qty, user_id, content_id, reservation_type, receiver_name, receiver_birth, receiver_phone, reserve_visit, receive_type, created_at, schedule_id ) VALUES ( #{reservation_code}, #{reserved_for_at}, #{time_zone}, #{reservation_status}, #{total_price}, #{adult_qty}, #{child_qty}, #{teen_qty}, #{user_id}, #{content_id}, #{reservation_type}, #{receiver_name}, #{receiver_birth}, #{receiver_phone}, #{reserve_visit}, #{receive_type}, NOW(), #{schedule_id} )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, reservation_id, payment_key, order_key, payment_method, payment_status, amount_price, refund_status, paid_at FROM payment WHERE order_key = #{order_key}

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_for_at, r.time_zone, r.reservation_code, r.receive_type, c.content_id, c.title, c.main_image_path, p.payment_status, p.order_key AS order_id, CASE WHEN r2.review_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as review_exists FROM reservation r JOIN content c ON r.content_id = c.content_id JOIN payment p ON r.reservation_id = p.reservation_id LEFT JOIN review r2 ON r.reservation_id = r2.reservation_id WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id}
AND r.reservation_status = 'CANCELED'
AND r.reserved_for_at >= NOW() AND r.reservation_status = 'DONE'
AND r.reserved_for_at < NOW()
ORDER BY r.reserved_for_at, r.time_zone

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_for_at, r.time_zone, r.reservation_code, r.receive_type, r.receiver_name, r.receiver_birth, r.receiver_phone, r.adult_qty, r.child_qty, r.teen_qty, c.content_id, c.title, c.main_image_path, c.location, p.paid_at, p.payment_status, p.payment_method, p.amount_price,p.cancel_amount FROM content c JOIN reservation r ON r.content_id = c.content_id JOIN payment p ON r.reservation_id = p.reservation_id WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id} AND r.reservation_id = #{reservation_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation r JOIN payment p ON r.reservation_id = p.reservation_id SET reservation_status = 'VISITED' WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservation_id} AND payment_status = 'DONE' AND ( reservation_status NOT IN ('CANCELED','PENDING') OR reservation_status IS NULL );
